Class KryoUtils

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.persistence.kryo.KryoUtils
public class KryoUtils extends Object
A utility class for thread-safe Kryo serialization and deserialization.

This class uses a ThreadLocal to manage Kryo instances. This is the standard, enterprise-grade pattern for using Kryo in a multi-threaded environment because Kryo instances are **not thread-safe**.

  • Method Details

    • getKryo

      public static com.esotericsoftware.kryo.Kryo getKryo()
      Retrieves the Kryo instance for the currently executing thread.
      Returns:
      A thread-safe Kryo instance.

    • clone

      public static <T> T clone(T object)
      Creates a deep clone of the given object using a serialization-deserialization cycle.

      Technical Purity: This approach is preferred over kryo.copy() because it authoritatively respects the transient modifier, ensuring that environmental references (like the AsiContainer or ThreadPools) are not accidentally cloned, which prevents circular dependencies and access violations in JDK 17+.

      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the object.
      Parameters:
      object - The object to clone.
      Returns:
      A deep clone of the object.

    • serialize

      public static byte[] serialize(Object object)
      Serializes an object into a byte array.
      Parameters:
      object - The object to serialize.
      Returns:
      A byte array representing the serialized object.

    • deserialize

      public static <T> T deserialize(byte[] bytes, Class<T> clazz)
      Deserializes a byte array into an object.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the object to deserialize.
      Parameters:
      bytes - The byte array to deserialize.
      clazz - The class of the object.
      Returns:
      The deserialized object.
